tEn: DanceGRPO: Unleashing GRPO on Visual Generation
tZh: DanceGRPO：在视觉生成中释放GRPO的潜力
sEn: DanceGRPO stably optimizes visual generation models across diverse tasks and reward models, outperforming baselines by up to 181%.
sZh: DanceGRPO稳定优化多种视觉生成模型，在多样化任务和奖励模型上超越基线方法高达181%。
absEn: Recent advances in generative AI have revolutionized visual content creation, yet aligning model outputs with human preferences remains a critical challenge. While Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a promising approach for fine-tuning generative models, existing methods like DDPO and DPOK face fundamental limitations - particularly their inability to maintain stable optimization when scaling to large and diverse prompt sets, severely restricting their practical utility. This paper presents DanceGRPO, a framework that addresses these limitations through an innovative adaptation of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) for visual generation tasks. Our key insight is that GRPO's inherent stability mechanisms uniquely position it to overcome the optimization challenges that plague prior RL-based approaches on visual generation. DanceGRPO establishes several significant advances: First, it demonstrates consistent and stable policy optimization across multiple modern generative paradigms, including both diffusion models and rectified flows. Second, it maintains robust performance when scaling to complex, real-world scenarios encompassing three key tasks and four foundation models. Third, it shows remarkable versatility in optimizing for diverse human preferences as captured by five distinct reward models assessing image/video aesthetics, text-image alignment, video motion quality, and binary feedback. Our comprehensive experiments reveal that DanceGRPO outperforms baseline methods by up to 181\% across multiple established benchmarks, including HPS-v2.1, CLIP Score, VideoAlign, and GenEval. Our results establish DanceGRPO as a robust and versatile solution for scaling Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) tasks in visual generation, offering new insights into harmonizing reinforcement learning and visual synthesis.
absZh: 生成式AI的最新进展彻底改变了视觉内容创作，但将模型输出与人类偏好对齐仍是一个关键挑战。虽然强化学习已成为微调生成模型的一种有前景的方法，但现有方法如DDPO和DPOK存在根本性局限——特别是在扩展到大规模和多样化提示集时无法保持稳定优化，严重限制了其实用性。本文提出DanceGRPO框架，通过创新性地将群体相对策略优化（GRPO）应用于视觉生成任务来解决这些局限。我们的关键洞察是，GRPO固有的稳定机制使其能够克服先前基于强化学习方法在视觉生成中面临的优化挑战。DanceGRPO取得了多项重要进展：首先，它在多种现代生成范式（包括扩散模型和整流流）中展示了持续稳定的策略优化。其次，在扩展到包含三个关键任务和四个基础模型的复杂真实场景时，它保持了稳健性能。第三，它在优化由五种不同奖励模型（评估图像/视频美学、文本-图像对齐、视频运动质量和二元反馈）捕获的多样化人类偏好方面表现出显著的多功能性。我们的综合实验表明，DanceGRPO在多个既定基准（包括HPS-v2.1、CLIP Score、VideoAlign和GenEval）上比基线方法高出高达181%。我们的结果确立了DanceGRPO作为在视觉生成中扩展基于人类反馈的强化学习任务的稳健且多功能的解决方案，为协调强化学习和视觉合成提供了新见解。

contrib.en: First to extend GRPO to diffusion models and rectified flows for visual generation.
contrib.zh: 首次将GRPO扩展到扩散模型和整流流用于视觉生成。

contrib.en: Unified framework across two generative paradigms, three tasks, four foundation models, and five reward models.
contrib.zh: 统一框架涵盖两种生成范式、三个任务、四个基础模型和五个奖励模型。

contrib.en: Demonstrates stable policy optimization on large-scale datasets, outperforming prior RL methods.
contrib.zh: 在大规模数据集上展示稳定的策略优化，优于先前强化学习方法。

contrib.en: Achieves up to 181% improvement over baselines on benchmarks like HPS-v2.1 and VideoAlign.
contrib.zh: 在HPS-v2.1和VideoAlign等基准上比基线提升高达181%。

contrib.en: Enables Best-of-N inference scaling and learning from sparse binary feedback.
contrib.zh: 支持Best-of-N推理缩放和从稀疏二元反馈中学习。

contrib.en: Provides insights into harmonizing reinforcement learning and visual synthesis.
contrib.zh: 为协调强化学习和视觉合成提供见解。

limits.en: Requires significant computational resources (up to 64 H800 GPUs).
limits.zh: 需要大量计算资源（最多64块H800 GPU）。

limits.en: Binary reward models are preliminary; more powerful rule-based visual reward models needed.
limits.zh: 二元奖励模型是初步的；需要更强大的基于规则的视觉奖励模型。

limits.en: KL-regularization omitted; may risk reward over-optimization in some settings.
limits.zh: 省略了KL正则化；在某些设置中可能存在奖励过度优化的风险。

limits.en: Best-of-N scaling uses brute-force search; tree search or greedy search not explored.
limits.zh: Best-of-N缩放使用暴力搜索；未探索树搜索或贪心搜索。

limits.en: Video reward model (VideoAlign) text-video alignment dimension unstable and excluded.
limits.zh: 视频奖励模型（VideoAlign）的文本-视频对齐维度不稳定，被排除。

items.en: 1]ByteDance Seed 2]The University of Hong Kong \contribution[†]Corresponding authors \contribution[‡]Project lead
items.zh: 1]字节跳动Seed 2]香港大学 \contribution[†]通讯作者 \contribution[‡]项目负责人

items.en: Recent breakthroughs in generative models—particularly diffusion models and rectified flows—have revolutionized visual content creation, yet aligning model outputs with human preferences remains a critical challenge. Existing reinforcement learning (RL)-based methods for visual generation face critical limitations: incompatibility with modern Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs)-based sampling paradigms, instability in large-scale training, and lack of validation for video generation. This paper introduces DanceGRPO, the first unified framework to adapt Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to visual generation paradigms, unleashing one unified RL algorithm across two generative paradigms (diffusion models and rectified flows), three tasks (text-to-image, text-to-video, image-to-video), four foundation models (Stable Diffusion, HunyuanVideo, FLUX, SkyReels-I2V), and five reward models (image/video aesthetics, text-image alignment, video motion quality, and binary reward). To our knowledge, DanceGRPO is the first RL-based unified framework capable of seamless adaptation across diverse generative paradigms, tasks, foundational models, and reward models. DanceGRPO demonstrates consistent and substantial improvements, which outperform baselines by up to 181% on benchmarks such as HPS-v2.1, CLIP Score, VideoAlign, and GenEval. Notably, DanceGRPO not only can stabilize policy optimization for complex video generation, but also enables generative policy to better capture denoising trajectories for Best-of-N inference scaling and learn from sparse binary feedback. Our results establish DanceGRPO as a robust and versatile solution for scaling Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) tasks in visual generation, offering new insights into harmonizing reinforcement learning and visual synthesis. The code will be released.
items.zh: 生成模型的最新突破——特别是扩散模型和整流流——彻底改变了视觉内容创作，然而将模型输出与人类偏好对齐仍然是一个关键挑战。现有的基于强化学习（RL）的视觉生成方法面临关键限制：与现代常微分方程（ODE）采样范式不兼容、大规模训练不稳定以及缺乏对视频生成的验证。本文介绍了DanceGRPO，这是第一个将群体相对策略优化（GRPO）适配到视觉生成范式的统一框架，在一个统一的RL算法下涵盖两种生成范式（扩散模型和整流流）、三个任务（文生图、文生视频、图生视频）、四个基础模型（Stable Diffusion、HunyuanVideo、FLUX、SkyReels-I2V）和五个奖励模型（图像/视频美学、文本-图像对齐、视频运动质量、二元奖励）。据我们所知，DanceGRPO是第一个基于RL的统一框架，能够无缝适配不同的生成范式、任务、基础模型和奖励模型。DanceGRPO展示了一致且显著的改进，在HPS-v2.1、CLIP Score、VideoAlign和GenEval等基准上比基线高出高达181%。值得注意的是，DanceGRPO不仅能稳定复杂视频生成的策略优化，还能使生成策略更好地捕捉去噪轨迹以实现Best-of-N推理缩放，并从稀疏的二元反馈中学习。我们的结果确立了DanceGRPO作为视觉生成中缩放基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）任务的稳健且通用的解决方案，为协调强化学习和视觉合成提供了新见解。代码将发布。

items.en: [Project Page]https://dancegrpo.github.io/
items.zh: [项目页面]https://dancegrpo.github.io/

items.en: Recent advances in generative models—particularly diffusion models [1, 2, 3, 4] and rectified flows [5, 6, 7]—have transformed visual content creation by improving output quality and versatility in image and video generation. While pretraining establishes foundational data distributions, integrating human feedback during training proves critical for aligning outputs with human preferences and aesthetic criteria [8]. Existing methods face notable limitations: ReFL [9, 10, 11] relies on differentiable reward models, which introduce VRAM inefficiency in video generation and require several extensive engineering efforts, while DPO variants (Diffusion-DPO [12, 13], Flow-DPO [14], OnlineVPO [15]) achieve only marginal visual quality improvements. Reinforcement learning (RL)-based methods [16, 17], which optimize rewards as black-box objectives, offer potential solutions but introduce three unresolved challenges: (1) the Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs)-based sampling of rectified flow models conflict with Markov Decision Process formulations; (2) prior policy gradient approaches (DDPO [18], DPOK [19]) show instability when scaling beyond small datasets (e.g., <100 prompts); and (3) existing methods remain unvalidated for video generation tasks.
items.zh: 生成模型的最新进展——特别是扩散模型[1, 2, 3, 4]和整流流[5, 6, 7]——通过提高图像和视频生成中的输出质量和多样性，改变了视觉内容创作。虽然预训练建立了基础数据分布，但在训练过程中整合人类反馈对于将输出与人类偏好和美学标准对齐至关重要[8]。现有方法面临显著限制：ReFL [9, 10, 11]依赖可微奖励模型，这在视频生成中引入VRAM低效并需要大量工程努力，而DPO变体（Diffusion-DPO [12, 13]、Flow-DPO [14]、OnlineVPO [15]）仅实现边际视觉质量改进。基于强化学习（RL）的方法[16, 17]将奖励作为黑盒目标进行优化，提供了潜在解决方案，但引入了三个未解决的挑战：（1）整流流模型的基于常微分方程（ODE）的采样与马尔可夫决策过程公式冲突；（2）先前的策略梯度方法（DDPO [18]、DPOK [19]）在扩展到小数据集（例如<100个提示）之外时表现出不稳定性；（3）现有方法尚未在视频生成任务中得到验证。

items.en: This work addresses these gaps by reformulating the sampling of diffusion models and rectified flows via Stochastic Differential Equations (SDEs) and applying Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) [20, 21] to stabilize the training process. GRPO is a recent breakthrough that enhances the performance of large language models (LLMs) on complex tasks such as mathematics and coding. In this paper, we pioneer the adaptation of GRPO to visual generation tasks through the DanceGRPO framework, establishing a "harmonious dance" between GRPO and visual generation tasks.
items.zh: 本文通过将扩散模型和整流流的采样过程重新表述为随机微分方程（SDE），并应用群体相对策略优化（GRPO）[20, 21]来稳定训练过程，解决了这些差距。GRPO是最近的一项突破，它增强了大型语言模型（LLM）在数学和编码等复杂任务上的性能。在本文中，我们率先通过DanceGRPO框架将GRPO适配到视觉生成任务，建立了GRPO与视觉生成任务之间的“和谐之舞”。

items.en: We present a comprehensive study of one algorithm, DanceGRPO across two generative paradigms (diffusion/rectified flows), three tasks (text-to-image, text-to-video, image-to-video), four foundation models (Stable Diffusion [2], HunyuanVideo [22], FLUX [23], SkyReels-I2V [24]), and five reward models (image/video aesthetics, text-image alignment, video motion quality, and binary thresholds).
items.zh: 我们提出了一个算法DanceGRPO的全面研究，涵盖两种生成范式（扩散/整流流）、三个任务（文生图、文生视频、图生视频）、四个基础模型（Stable Diffusion [2]、HunyuanVideo [22]、FLUX [23]、SkyReels-I2V [24]）和五个奖励模型（图像/视频美学、文本-图像对齐、视频运动质量和二元阈值）。

items.en: Our contributions can be summarized as follows:
items.zh: 我们的贡献可以总结如下：

items.en: Unified and Pioneering. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to extend GRPO to diffusion models and rectified flows, accomplishing multiple visual generation tasks within a unified RL framework. We achieve seamless integration between GRPO and visual generation tasks by carefully reformulating the SDEs, selecting appropriate optimized timesteps, and initializing noise and noise scales.
items.zh: 统一且开创性。据我们所知，我们是第一个将GRPO扩展到扩散模型和整流流的工作，在统一的RL框架内完成多个视觉生成任务。通过仔细重新表述SDE、选择适当的优化时间步以及初始化噪声和噪声尺度，我们实现了GRPO与视觉生成任务之间的无缝集成。

items.en: Generalization and Scalability. To our knowledge, DanceGRPO is the first RL-based unified framework capable of seamless adaptation across diverse generative paradigms, tasks, foundational models, and reward models. Unlike prior RL algorithms, primarily validated on text-to-image diffusion models on small-scale datasets, DanceGRPO demonstrates robust performance on large-scale datasets, showcasing both scalability and practical applicability.
items.zh: 泛化性和可扩展性。据我们所知，DanceGRPO是第一个基于RL的统一框架，能够无缝适配不同的生成范式、任务、基础模型和奖励模型。与先前主要在小规模数据集上针对文生图扩散模型验证的RL算法不同，DanceGRPO在大规模数据集上展示了稳健的性能，展现了可扩展性和实际适用性。

items.en: High Effectiveness. Our experiments demonstrate that DanceGRPO achieves significant performance gains, outperforming baselines by up to 181% across multiple academic benchmarks, including HPS-v2.1 [25], CLIP score [26], VideoAlign [14], and GenEval [27], in visual generation tasks. Notably, DanceGRPO also enables models to learn the denoising trajectory in Best-of-N inference scaling. We also make some initial attempts to enable models to capture the distribution of binary (0/1) reward models, showing its ability to capture sparse, thresholding feedback.
items.zh: 高效性。我们的实验表明，DanceGRPO在视觉生成任务中取得了显著的性能提升，在多个学术基准（包括HPS-v2.1 [25]、CLIP分数 [26]、VideoAlign [14]和GenEval [27]）上比基线高出高达181%。值得注意的是，DanceGRPO还使模型能够在Best-of-N推理缩放中学习去噪轨迹。我们还进行了一些初步尝试，使模型能够捕捉二元（0/1）奖励模型的分布，展示了其捕捉稀疏阈值反馈的能力。

items.en: Diffusion Model [1]. A diffusion process gradually destroys an observed datapoint 𝐱\mathbf{x} over timestep tt, by mixing data with noise, and the forward process of the diffusion model can be defined as :
items.zh: 扩散模型 [1]。扩散过程通过将数据与噪声混合，在时间步t上逐渐破坏观测数据点𝐱，扩散模型的前向过程可以定义为：

items.en: and αt\alpha_{t} and σt\sigma_{t} denote the noise schedule. The noise schedule is designed in a way such that 𝐳0\mathbf{z}_{0} is close to clean data and 𝐳1\mathbf{z}_{1} is close to Gaussian noise. To generate a new sample, we initialize the sample 𝐳1\mathbf{z}_{1} and define the sample equation of the diffusion model given the denoising model output ϵ^\hat{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}} at time step tt:
items.zh: 其中αt和σt表示噪声调度。噪声调度的设计使得𝐳0接近干净数据，𝐳1接近高斯噪声。为了生成新样本，我们初始化样本𝐳1，并根据去噪模型在时间步t的输出ϵ̂定义扩散模型的采样方程：

items.en: where 𝐱^\hat{\mathbf{x}} can be derived via Eq.(1) and then we can reach a lower noise level ss. This is also a DDIM sampler [28].
items.zh: 其中𝐱̂可以通过公式(1)推导，然后我们可以达到更低的噪声水平s。这也是DDIM采样器[28]。

items.en: Rectified Flow [6]. In rectified flow, we view the forward process as a linear interpolation between the data 𝐱\mathbf{x} and a noise term ϵ\boldsymbol{\epsilon}:
items.zh: 整流流 [6]。在整流流中，我们将前向过程视为数据𝐱和噪声项ϵ之间的线性插值：

items.en: where ϵ\boldsymbol{\epsilon} is always defined as a Gaussian noise. We define the 𝐮=ϵ−𝐱\mathbf{u}=\boldsymbol{\epsilon}-\mathbf{x} as the "velocity" or "vector field". Similar to diffusion model, given the denoising model output 𝐮^\hat{\mathbf{u}} at time step tt, we can reach a lower noise level ss by:
items.zh: 其中ϵ通常定义为高斯噪声。我们将𝐮=ϵ-𝐱定义为“速度”或“向量场”。与扩散模型类似，给定去噪模型在时间步t的输出𝐮̂，我们可以通过以下方式达到更低的噪声水平s：

items.en: Analysis. Although the diffusion model and rectified flow have different theoretical foundations, in practice, they are two sides of a coin, as shown in the following formula:
items.zh: 分析。尽管扩散模型和整流流具有不同的理论基础，但在实践中，它们是同一枚硬币的两面，如下式所示：

items.en: For ϵ\boldsymbol{\epsilon}-prediction (a.k.a. diffusion model), from Eq.(2), we have 𝐳~s=𝐳s/αs\tilde{\mathbf{z}}_{s}=\mathbf{z}_{s}/\alpha_{s}, 𝐳~t=𝐳t/αt\tilde{\mathbf{z}}_{t}=\mathbf{z}_{t}/\alpha_{t}, ηs=σs/αs\eta_{s}=\sigma_{s}/\alpha_{s}, and ηt=σt/αt\eta_{t}=\sigma_{t}/\alpha_{t}. For rectified flows, we have 𝐳~s=𝐳s\tilde{\mathbf{z}}_{s}=\mathbf{z}_{s}, 𝐳~t=𝐳t\tilde{\mathbf{z}}_{t}=\mathbf{z}_{t}, ηs=s\eta_{s}=s, and ηt=t\eta_{t}=t from Eq.(4).
items.zh: 对于ϵ预测（即扩散模型），从公式(2)我们有𝐳̃_s=𝐳_s/α_s，𝐳̃_t=𝐳_t/α_t，η_s=σ_s/α_s，η_t=σ_t/α_t。对于整流流，从公式(4)我们有𝐳̃_s=𝐳_s，𝐳̃_t=𝐳_t，η_s=s，η_t=t。

items.en: In this section, we first formulate the sampling processes of diffusion models and rectified flows as Markov Decision Processes. Then, we introduce the sampling SDEs and the algorithm of DanceGRPO.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们首先将扩散模型和整流流的采样过程形式化为马尔可夫决策过程。然后，我们介绍采样SDE和DanceGRPO算法。

items.en: Denoising as a Markov Decision Process. Following DDPO [18], we formulate the denoising process of the diffusion model and rectified flow as a Markov Decision Process (MDP):
items.zh: 去噪作为马尔可夫决策过程。遵循DDPO [18]，我们将扩散模型和整流流的去噪过程形式化为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）：

items.en: where 𝐜\mathbf{c} is the prompt, and π​(𝐚t∣𝐬t)\pi(\mathbf{a}_{t}\mid\mathbf{s}_{t}) is the probability from ztz_{t} to zt−1z_{t-1}. And δy\delta_{y} is the Dirac delta distribution with nonzero density only at yy. Trajectories consist of TT timesteps, after which PP leads to a termination state. r​(𝐳0,𝐜)r(\mathbf{z}_{0},\mathbf{c}) is the reward model, which is always parametrized by a Vision-Language model (such as CLIP [26] and Qwen-VL [29]).
items.zh: 其中𝐜是提示，π(𝐚_t|𝐬_t)是从z_t到z_{t-1}的概率。δ_y是仅在y处非零的狄拉克delta分布。轨迹由T个时间步组成，之后PP导致终止状态。r(𝐳_0, 𝐜)是奖励模型，通常由视觉语言模型（如CLIP [26]和Qwen-VL [29]）参数化。

items.en: Formulation of Sampling SDEs. Since GRPO requires stochastic exploration through multiple trajectory samples, where policy updates depend on the trajectory probability distribution and their associated reward signals, we unify the sampling processes of the diffusion model and rectified flows into the form of SDEs. For the diffusion model, as demonstrated in [30, 31], the forward SDE is given by: d​𝐳t=ft​𝐳t​d​t+gt​d​𝐰\mathrm{d}\mathbf{z}_{t}=f_{t}\mathbf{z}_{t}\mathrm{d}t+g_{t}\mathrm{d}\mathbf{w}. The corresponding reverse SDE can be expressed as:
items.zh: 采样SDE的公式化。由于GRPO需要通过多个轨迹样本进行随机探索，其中策略更新依赖于轨迹概率分布及其相关的奖励信号，我们将扩散模型和整流流的采样过程统一为SDE形式。对于扩散模型，如[30, 31]所示，前向SDE为：d𝐳_t = f_t 𝐳_t dt + g_t d𝐰。相应的反向SDE可表示为：

items.en: where d​𝐰\mathrm{d}\mathbf{w} is a Brownian motion, and εt\varepsilon_{t} introduces the stochasticity during sampling.
items.zh: 其中d𝐰是布朗运动，ε_t在采样过程中引入随机性。

items.en: Similarly, the forward ODE of rectified flow is: d​𝐳t=𝐮t​d​t\mathrm{d}\mathbf{z}_{t}=\mathbf{u}_{t}\mathrm{d}t. The generative process reverses the ODE in time. However, this deterministic formulation cannot provide the stochastic exploration required for GRPO. Inspired by [32, 33, 34], we introduce an SDE case during the reverse process as follows:
items.zh: 类似地，整流流的前向ODE为：d𝐳_t = 𝐮_t dt。生成过程在时间上反转该ODE。然而，这种确定性公式无法提供GRPO所需的随机探索。受[32, 33, 34]启发，我们在反向过程中引入SDE情况如下：

items.en: where εt\varepsilon_{t} also introduces the stochasticity during sampling. Given a normal distribution pt​(𝐳t)=𝒩​(𝐳t∣αt​𝐱,σt2​I)p_{t}(\mathbf{z}_{t})=\mathcal{N}(\mathbf{z}_{t}\mid\alpha_{t}\mathbf{x},\sigma_{t}^{2}I), we have ∇log⁡pt​(𝐳t)=−(𝐳t−αt​𝐱)/σt2\nabla\log p_{t}(\mathbf{z}_{t})=-(\mathbf{z}_{t}-\alpha_{t}\mathbf{x})/\sigma_{t}^{2}. We can insert this into the above two SDEs and obtain the π​(𝐚t∣𝐬t)\pi(\mathbf{a}_{t}\mid\mathbf{s}_{t}). More theoretical analysis can be found in Appendix 7.
items.zh: 其中ε_t也在采样过程中引入随机性。给定正态分布p_t(𝐳_t) = 𝒩(𝐳_t | α_t 𝐱, σ_t^2 I)，我们有∇log p_t(𝐳_t) = -(𝐳_t - α_t 𝐱)/σ_t^2。我们可以将其代入上述两个SDE，得到π(𝐚_t | 𝐬_t)。更多理论分析见附录7。

items.en: Algorithm. Motivated by Deepseek-R1 [20], given a prompt 𝐜\mathbf{c}, generative models will sample a group of outputs {𝐨1,𝐨2,…,𝐨G}\{\mathbf{o}_{1},\mathbf{o}_{2},...,\mathbf{o}_{G}\} from the model πθo​l​d\pi_{\theta_{old}}, and optimize the policy model πθ\pi_{\theta} by maximizing the following objective function:
items.zh: 算法。受Deepseek-R1 [20]启发，给定提示𝐜，生成模型将从模型π_{θ_old}中采样一组输出{𝐨_1, 𝐨_2, ..., 𝐨_G}，并通过最大化以下目标函数来优化策略模型π_θ：

items.en: where ρt,i=πθ​(𝐚t,i|𝐬t,i)πθo​l​d​(𝐚t,i|𝐬t,i)\mathbf{\rho}_{t,i}=\frac{\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{a}_{t,i}|\mathbf{s}_{t,i})}{\pi_{\theta_{old}}(\mathbf{a}_{t,i}|\mathbf{s}_{t,i})}, and πθ​(𝐚t,i|𝐬t,i)\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{a}_{t,i}|\mathbf{s}_{t,i}) is the policy function is MDP for output 𝐨i\mathbf{o}_{i} at time step tt, ϵ\epsilon is a hyper-parameter, and AiA_{i} is the advantage function, computed using a group of rewards {r1,r2,…,rG}\{r_{1},r_{2},...,r_{G}\} corresponding to the outputs within each group:
items.zh: 其中ρ_{t,i} = π_θ(𝐚_{t,i}|𝐬_{t,i}) / π_{θ_old}(𝐚_{t,i}|𝐬_{t,i})，π_θ(𝐚_{t,i}|𝐬_{t,i})是输出𝐨_i在时间步t的MDP中的策略函数，ϵ是超参数，A_i是优势函数，使用每组内输出对应的奖励集合{r_1, r_2, ..., r_G}计算：

items.en: Due to reward sparsity in practice, we apply the same reward signal across all timesteps during optimization. While traditional GRPO formulations employ KL-regularization to prevent reward over-optimization, we empirically observe minimal performance differences when omitting this component. So, we omit the KL-regularization item by default. The full algorithm can be found in Algorithm 1. We also introduce how to train with Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) [35] in Appendix 8. In summary, we formulate the sampling processes of diffusion model and rectified flow as MDPs, use SDE sampling equations, adopt a GRPO-style objective, and generalize to text-to-image, text-to-video, and image-to-video generation tasks.
items.zh: 由于实际中奖励稀疏，我们在优化过程中对所有时间步应用相同的奖励信号。虽然传统的GRPO公式使用KL正则化来防止奖励过度优化，但我们经验性地观察到省略该组件时性能差异极小。因此，我们默认省略KL正则化项。完整算法见算法1。我们还在附录8中介绍了如何使用无分类器引导（CFG）[35]进行训练。总之，我们将扩散模型和整流流的采样过程公式化为MDP，使用SDE采样方程，采用GRPO风格的目标函数，并推广到文本到图像、文本到视频和图像到视频生成任务。

items.en: Initialization Noise. In the DanceGRPO framework, the initialization noise constitutes a critical component. Previous RL-based approaches like DDPO use different noise vectors to initialize training samples. However, as shown in Figure 8 in Appendix 11, assigning different noise vectors to samples with the same prompts always leads to reward hacking phenomena in video generation, including training instability. Therefore, in our framework, we assign shared initialization noise to samples originating from the same textual prompts.
items.zh: 初始化噪声。在DanceGRPO框架中，初始化噪声是一个关键组成部分。之前基于RL的方法如DDPO使用不同的噪声向量来初始化训练样本。然而，如附录11中图8所示，对相同提示的样本分配不同的噪声向量总是导致视频生成中的奖励破解现象，包括训练不稳定。因此，在我们的框架中，我们对来自相同文本提示的样本分配共享的初始化噪声。

items.en: Timestep Selection. While the denoising process can be rigorously formalized within the MDP framework, empirical observations reveal that subsets of timesteps within a denoising trajectory can be omitted without compromising performance. This reduction in computational steps enhances efficiency while maintaining output quality, as further analyzed in Section 3.6.
items.zh: 时间步选择。虽然去噪过程可以在MDP框架内严格形式化，但经验观察表明，去噪轨迹中的子集时间步可以省略而不影响性能。这种计算步骤的减少提高了效率，同时保持了输出质量，如第3.6节进一步分析。

items.en: Incorporating Multiple Reward Models. In practice, we employ more than one reward model to ensure more stable training and higher-quality visual results. As illustrated in Figure 9 in Appendix, models trained exclusively with HPS-v2.1 rewards [25] tend to generate unnatural ("oily") outputs, whereas incorporating CLIP scores helps preserve more realistic image characteristics. Rather than directly combining rewards, we aggregate advantage functions, as different reward models often operate on different scales. This approach stabilizes optimization and leads to more balanced generations.
items.zh: 结合多个奖励模型。在实践中，我们使用不止一个奖励模型以确保更稳定的训练和更高质量的视觉结果。如附录中图9所示，仅使用HPS-v2.1奖励[25]训练的模型倾向于生成不自然（“油腻”）的输出，而加入CLIP分数有助于保留更真实的图像特征。我们不直接组合奖励，而是聚合优势函数，因为不同的奖励模型通常在不同的尺度上运行。这种方法稳定了优化并导致更平衡的生成。

items.en: Extension on Best-of-N Inference Scaling. As outlined in Section 3.6, our methodology prioritizes the use of efficient samples—specifically, those associated with the top k and bottom k candidates selected by the Best-of-N sampling. This selective sampling strategy optimizes training efficacy by focusing on high-reward and critical low-reward regions of the solution space. We use brute-force search to generate these samples. While alternative approaches, such as tree search or greedy search, remain promising avenues for further exploration, we defer their systematic integration to future research.
items.zh: Best-of-N推理Scaling的扩展。如第3.6节所述，我们的方法优先使用高效样本——具体来说，是由Best-of-N采样选择的前k和后k候选样本。这种选择性采样策略通过关注解空间中的高奖励和关键低奖励区域来优化训练效率。我们使用暴力搜索生成这些样本。虽然其他方法如树搜索或贪心搜索仍然是进一步探索的有前景的途径，但我们将它们的系统集成留待未来研究。

full.sec: 2.3 Application to Different Tasks with Different Rewards
full.secZh: 2.3 不同任务与不同奖励的应用

items.en: We verify the effectiveness of our algorithm in two generative paradigms (diffusion/rectified flow) and three tasks (text-to-image, text-to-video, image-to-video). For this, we choose four fundamental models (Stable Diffusion [2], HunyuanVideo [22], FLUX [23], SkyReels-I2V [24]) for the experiment. All of these methods can be precisely constructed within the framework of MDP during their sampling process. This allows us to unify the theoretical bases across these tasks and improve them via DanceGRPO. To our knowledge, this is the first work to apply the unified framework to diverse visual generation tasks.
items.zh: 我们在两种生成范式（扩散/整流流）和三个任务（文本到图像、文本到视频、图像到视频）上验证了我们算法的有效性。为此，我们选择了四个基础模型（Stable Diffusion [2]、HunyuanVideo [22]、FLUX [23]、SkyReels-I2V [24]）进行实验。所有这些方法在其采样过程中都可以精确地构建在MDP框架内。这使我们能够统一这些任务的理论基础，并通过DanceGRPO改进它们。据我们所知，这是首次将统一框架应用于多样化的视觉生成任务的工作。

items.en: We use five reward models to optimize visual generation quality: (1) Image Aesthetics quantifies visual appeal using a pretrained model fine-tuned on human-rated data [25]; (2) Text-image Alignment employs CLIP [26] to maximize cross-modal consistency between prompts and outputs; (3) Video Aesthetics Quality extends image evaluation to temporal domains using VLMs [14, 29], assessing frame quality and coherence; (4) Video Motion Quality evaluates motion realism through physics-aware VLM[14] analysis of trajectories and deformations; (5) Thresholding Binary Reward employs a binary mechanism motivated by [20], where rewards are discretized via a fixed threshold (values exceeding the threshold receive 1, others 0), specifically designed to evaluate generative models’ ability to learn abrupt reward distributions under threshold-based optimization.
items.zh: 我们使用五个奖励模型来优化视觉生成质量：（1）图像美学使用在人类评分数据上微调的预训练模型量化视觉吸引力[25]；（2）文本-图像对齐使用CLIP [26]最大化提示与输出之间的跨模态一致性；（3）视频美学质量使用VLM [14, 29]将图像评估扩展到时间域，评估帧质量和连贯性；（4）视频运动质量通过物理感知的VLM [14]分析轨迹和变形来评估运动真实性；（5）阈值化二元奖励采用受[20]启发的二元机制，其中奖励通过固定阈值离散化（超过阈值的值获得1，否则为0），专门设计用于评估生成模型在基于阈值的优化下学习突然奖励分布的能力。

full.sec: 2.4 Comparisons with DDPO, DPOK, ReFL, and DPO

items.en: As evidenced by our comprehensive capability matrix in Table 1, DanceGRPO establishes new standards for diffusion model alignment. Our method achieves full-spectrum superiority across all evaluation dimensions: (1) seamless video generation, (2) large-scale dataset scalability, (3) significant reward improvements, (4) native compatibility with rectified flows, and (5) independence from differentiable rewards. This integrated capability profile – unobtainable by any single baseline method (DDPO/DPOK/ReFL/DPO) – enables simultaneous optimization across multiple generative domains while maintaining training stability. More comparisons can be found in Appendix 9.
items.zh: 如表1中的综合能力矩阵所示，DanceGRPO为扩散模型对齐设立了新标准。我们的方法在所有评估维度上实现了全频谱优势：（1）无缝视频生成，（2）大规模数据集可扩展性，（3）显著的奖励改进，（4）与整流流的原生兼容性，以及（5）不依赖可微奖励。这种综合能力概况——任何单一基线方法（DDPO/DPOK/ReFL/DPO）都无法实现——使得在多个生成领域同时优化成为可能，同时保持训练稳定性。更多比较见附录9。

items.en: Text-to-Image Generation. We employ Stable Diffusion v1.4, FLUX, and HunyuanVideo-T2I (using one latent frame in HunyuanVideo) as foundation models, with HPS-v2.1 [25] and CLIP score [26]—alongside their binary rewards—serving as reward models. A curated prompt dataset, balancing diversity and complexity, guides optimization. For evaluation, we select 1,000 test prompts to assess CLIP scores and Pick-a-Pic performance in Section 3.2. We use the official prompts for GenEval and HPS-v2.1 benchmark.
items.zh: 文本到图像生成。我们使用Stable Diffusion v1.4、FLUX和HunyuanVideo-T2I（在HunyuanVideo中使用一个潜在帧）作为基础模型，以HPS-v2.1 [25]和CLIP分数[26]及其二元奖励作为奖励模型。一个精心策划的提示数据集，平衡多样性和复杂性，指导优化。对于评估，我们选择1000个测试提示来评估第3.2节中的CLIP分数和Pick-a-Pic性能。我们使用GenEval和HPS-v2.1基准的官方提示。

items.en: Text-to-Video Generation. Our foundation model is HunyuanVideo [22], with reward signals derived from VideoAlign [14]. Prompts are curated using the VidProM [36] dataset, and an additional 1,000 test prompts are filtered to evaluate the VideoAlign scores in Section 3.3.
items.zh: 文本到视频生成。我们的基础模型是HunyuanVideo [22]，奖励信号来自VideoAlign [14]。提示使用VidProM [36]数据集策划，并额外筛选1000个测试提示以评估第3.3节中的VideoAlign分数。

items.en: Image-to-Video Generation. We use SkyReels-I2V [24] as our foundation model. VideoAlign [14] serves as the primary reward metric, while the prompt dataset, constructed via VidProM [36], is paired with reference images synthesized by HunyuanVideo-T2I [22] to ensure conditional fidelity. An additional 1000 test prompts are filtered to evaluate the VideoAlign score in Section 3.4.
items.zh: 图像到视频生成。我们使用SkyReels-I2V [24]作为基础模型。VideoAlign [14]作为主要奖励指标，而通过VidProM [36]构建的提示数据集与由HunyuanVideo-T2I [22]合成的参考图像配对，以确保条件保真度。额外筛选1000个测试提示以评估第3.4节中的VideoAlign分数。

items.en: Experimental Settings. We implemented all models with scaled computational resources appropriate to task complexity: 32 H800 GPUs for flow-based text-to-image models, 8 H800 GPUs for Stable Diffusion variants, 64 H800 GPUs for text-to-video generation systems, and 32 H800 GPUs for image-to-video transformation architectures. We develop our framework based on FastVideo [37, 38]. Comprehensive hyperparameter configurations and training protocols are detailed in Appendix 6. We always use more than 10,000 prompts to optimize the models. All reward curves presented in our paper are plotted using a moving average for smoother visualization. We use ODEs-based samplers for evaluation and visualization.
items.zh: 实验设置。我们使用与任务复杂性相适应的缩放计算资源实现了所有模型：基于流的文本到图像模型使用32块H800 GPU，Stable Diffusion变体使用8块H800 GPU，文本到视频生成系统使用64块H800 GPU，图像到视频转换架构使用32块H800 GPU。我们基于FastVideo [37, 38]开发了我们的框架。详细的超参数配置和训练协议见附录6。我们始终使用超过10,000个提示来优化模型。我们论文中呈现的所有奖励曲线均使用移动平均绘制以获得更平滑的可视化。我们使用基于ODE的采样器进行评估和可视化。

items.en: Stable Diffusion. Stable Diffusion v1.4, a diffusion-based text-to-image generation framework, comprises three core components: a UNet architecture for iterative denoising, a CLIP-based text encoder for semantic conditioning, and a variational autoencoder (VAE) for latent space modeling. As demonstrated in Table 2 and Figure 1(a), our proposed method, DanceGRPO, achieves a significant improvement in reward metrics, elevating the HPS score from 0.239 to 0.365, as well as the CLIP Score from 0.363 to 0.395. We also take the metric like the Pick-a-Pic [39] and GenEval [27] to evaluate our method. The results confirm the effectiveness of our method. Moreover, as shown in Table 3.1, our method exhibits the best performance in terms of metrics compared to other methods. We implement DPO as an online version following [15].
items.zh: Stable Diffusion。Stable Diffusion v1.4是一个基于扩散的文本到图像生成框架，包含三个核心组件：用于迭代去噪的UNet架构、用于语义条件的CLIP文本编码器，以及用于潜在空间建模的变分自编码器（VAE）。如表2和图1(a)所示，我们提出的方法DanceGRPO在奖励指标上取得了显著改进，将HPS分数从0.239提升到0.365，CLIP分数从0.363提升到0.395。我们还使用Pick-a-Pic [39]和GenEval [27]等指标评估我们的方法。结果证实了我们方法的有效性。此外，如表3.1所示，我们的方法在指标上相比其他方法表现出最佳性能。我们按照[15]将DPO实现为在线版本。

items.en: Building on insights from rule-based reward models such as DeepSeek-R1, we conduct preliminary experiments with a binary reward formulation. By thresholding the continuous HPS reward at 0.28—assigning (CLIP score at 0.39) a value of 1 for rewards above this threshold and 0 otherwise, we construct a simplified reward model. Figure 3(a) illustrates that DanceGRPO effectively adapts to this discretized reward distribution, despite the inherent simplicity of the thresholding approach. These results indicate the effectiveness of binary reward models in visual generation tasks. In the future, we will also strive to explore more powerful rule-based visual reward models, for example, making judgments through a multimodal large language model.
items.zh: 基于DeepSeek-R1等基于规则的奖励模型的见解，我们进行了二元奖励公式的初步实验。通过将连续HPS奖励阈值设为0.28——（CLIP分数为0.39）对于高于此阈值的奖励赋值为1，否则为0——我们构建了一个简化的奖励模型。图3(a)显示，尽管阈值方法本身简单，但DanceGRPO有效地适应了这种离散化的奖励分布。这些结果表明二元奖励模型在视觉生成任务中的有效性。未来，我们还将努力探索更强大的基于规则的视觉奖励模型，例如通过多模态大语言模型进行判断。

items.en: Best-of-N Inference Scaling. We explore sample efficiency through Best-of-N inference scaling using Stable Diffusion, as detailed in Section 2.2. By training the model on subsets of 16 samples (with the top 8 and bottom 8 rewards) selected from progressively larger pools (16, 64, and 256 samples per prompt), we evaluate the impact of sample curation on convergence dynamics about Stable Diffusion. Figure 4(a) reveals that Best-of-N scaling substantially accelerates convergence. This underscores the utility of strategic sample selection in reducing training overhead while maintaining performance. For alternative approaches, such as tree search or greedy search, we defer their systematic integration to future research.
items.zh: Best-of-N推理缩放。我们通过使用Stable Diffusion的Best-of-N推理缩放来探索样本效率，详见第2.2节。通过从逐渐增大的池（每个提示16、64和256个样本）中选择的16个样本子集（前8个和后8个奖励）训练模型，我们评估了样本筛选对Stable Diffusion收敛动态的影响。图4(a)显示，Best-of-N缩放显著加速了收敛。这凸显了策略性样本选择在减少训练开销同时保持性能方面的效用。对于其他方法，如树搜索或贪心搜索，我们将其系统集成留待未来研究。

items.en: FLUX. FLUX.1-dev is a flow-based text-to-image generation model that advances the state-of-the-art across multiple benchmarks, leveraging a more complex architecture than Stable Diffusion. To optimize performance, we integrate two reward models: HPS score and CLIP score. As illustrated in Figure 1(b) and Table 3, the proposed training paradigm achieves significant improvements across all reward metrics.
items.zh: FLUX。FLUX.1-dev是一种基于流的文本到图像生成模型，在多个基准测试中提升了最先进水平，采用了比Stable Diffusion更复杂的架构。为了优化性能，我们集成了两个奖励模型：HPS分数和CLIP分数。如图1(b)和表3所示，所提出的训练范式在所有奖励指标上均取得了显著改进。

items.en: HunyuanVideo-T2I. HunyuanVideo-T2I is a text-to-image adaptation of the HunyuanVideo framework, reconfigured by reducing the number of latent frames to one. This modification transforms the original video generation architecture into a flow-based image synthesis model. We further optimize the system using the publicly available HPS-v2.1 model, a human-preference-driven metric for visual quality. As demonstrated in Figure 1(c), this approach elevates the mean reward score from about 0.23 to 0.33, reflecting enhanced alignment with human aesthetic preferences.
items.zh: HunyuanVideo-T2I。HunyuanVideo-T2I是HunyuanVideo框架的文本到图像改编版本，通过将潜在帧数减少到一帧进行重新配置。这一修改将原始视频生成架构转变为基于流的图像合成模型。我们进一步使用公开可用的HPS-v2.1模型（一种基于人类偏好的视觉质量度量）优化系统。如图1(c)所示，该方法将平均奖励分数从约0.23提升至0.33，反映了与人类审美偏好的更好对齐。

items.capEn: Figure 1: We visualize the reward curves of Stable Diffusion, FLUX.1-dev, and HunyuanVideo-T2I on HPS score from left to right. After applying CLIP score, the HPS score decreases, but the generated images become more natural (Figure 9 in Appendix), and the CLIP score improves (Tables 2 and 3).
items.capZh: 图1：我们从左到右可视化了Stable Diffusion、FLUX.1-dev和HunyuanVideo-T2I在HPS分数上的奖励曲线。应用CLIP分数后，HPS分数下降，但生成的图像变得更自然（附录图9），且CLIP分数提升（表2和表3）。

items.capEn: Figure 2: We visualize the training curves of motion quality and visual aesthetics quality on HunyuanVideo, motion quality on SkyReels-I2V.
items.capZh: 图2：我们可视化了HunyuanVideo上运动质量和视觉美学质量的训练曲线，以及SkyReels-I2V上的运动质量。

items.en: HunyuanVideo. Optimizing text-to-video generation models presents significantly greater challenges compared to text-to-image frameworks, primarily due to elevated computational costs during training and inference, as well as slower convergence rates. In the pretraining protocol, we always adopt a progressive strategy: initial training focuses on text-to-image generation, followed by low-resolution video synthesis, and culminates in high-resolution video refinement. However, empirical observations reveal that relying solely on image-centric optimization leads to suboptimal video generation outcomes. To address this, our implementation employs training video samples synthesized at a resolution of 480×480 pixels, but we can visualize the samples with larger pixels.
items.zh: HunyuanVideo。优化文本到视频生成模型相比文本到图像框架面临显著更大的挑战，主要由于训练和推理期间计算成本升高以及收敛速度较慢。在预训练协议中，我们始终采用渐进策略：初始训练聚焦于文本到图像生成，随后是低分辨率视频合成，最后是高分辨率视频精炼。然而，经验观察表明，仅依赖图像中心优化会导致次优的视频生成结果。为解决此问题，我们的实现使用以480×480像素分辨率合成的训练视频样本，但我们可以可视化更大像素的样本。

items.en: Furthermore, constructing an effective video reward model for training alignment poses substantial difficulties. Our experiments evaluated several candidates: the Videoscore [40] model exhibited unstable reward distributions, rendering it impractical for optimization, while Visionreward-Video [41], a 29-dimensional metric, yielded semantically coherent rewards but suffered from inaccuracies across individual dimensions. Consequently, we adopted VideoAlign [14], a multidimensional framework evaluating three critical aspects: visual aesthetics quality, motion quality, and text-video alignment. Notably, the text-video alignment dimension demonstrated significant instability, prompting its exclusion from our final analysis. We also increase the number of sampled frames per second for VideoAlign to improve the training stability. As illustrated in Figure 2(a) and Figure 2(b), our methodology achieves relative improvements of 56% and 181% in visual and motion quality metrics, respectively. Extended qualitative results are provided in the Table 3.1.
items.zh: 此外，构建有效的视频奖励模型用于训练对齐面临巨大困难。我们的实验评估了几个候选模型：Videoscore [40]模型表现出不稳定的奖励分布，使其不适用于优化；而Visionreward-Video [41]（一个29维度量）产生语义连贯的奖励，但在各个维度上存在不准确性。因此，我们采用了VideoAlign [14]，这是一个多维框架，评估三个关键方面：视觉美学质量、运动质量和文本-视频对齐。值得注意的是，文本-视频对齐维度表现出显著不稳定性，导致其被排除在最终分析之外。我们还增加了VideoAlign每秒采样帧数以提高训练稳定性。如图2(a)和图2(b)所示，我们的方法在视觉和运动质量指标上分别实现了56%和181%的相对改进。扩展的定性结果见表3.1。

items.en: SkyReels-I2V. SkyReels-I2V represents a state-of-the-art open-source image-to-video (I2V) generation framework, established as of February 2025 at the inception of this study. Derived from the HunyuanVideo architecture, the model is fine-tuned by integrating image conditions into the input concatenation process. A central finding of our investigation is that I2V models exclusively allow optimization of motion quality, encompassing motion coherence and aesthetic dynamics, since visual fidelity and text-video alignment are inherently constrained by the attributes of the input image rather than the parametric space of the model. Consequently, our optimization protocol leverages the motion quality metric from the VideoAlign reward model, achieving a 91% relative improvement in this dimension as shown in Figure 2(c). We must enable the CFG-training to ensure the sampling quality during the RLHF training process.
items.zh: SkyReels-I2V。SkyReels-I2V代表了最先进的开源图像到视频（I2V）生成框架，截至本研究开始时的2025年2月已建立。该模型源自HunyuanVideo架构，通过将图像条件集成到输入拼接过程中进行微调。我们研究的一个核心发现是，I2V模型仅允许优化运动质量，包括运动连贯性和美学动态，因为视觉保真度和文本-视频对齐本质上受输入图像属性而非模型参数空间的约束。因此，我们的优化协议利用VideoAlign奖励模型中的运动质量度量，在该维度上实现了91%的相对改进，如图2(c)所示。在RLHF训练过程中，我们必须启用CFG训练以确保采样质量。

items.capEn: Figure 3: (a) We visualize the training curves of binary rewards. (b) We show the human evaluation results using FLUX (T2I), HunyuanVideo (T2V), and SkyReel (I2V), respectively.
items.capZh: 图3：(a) 我们可视化了二元奖励的训练曲线。(b) 我们展示了分别使用FLUX（T2I）、HunyuanVideo（T2V）和SkyReel（I2V）进行的人工评估结果。

items.en: We present the results of our human evaluation, conducted using in-house prompts and reference images. For text-to-image generation, we evaluate FLUX on 240 prompts. For text-to-video generation, we assess HunyuanVideo on 200 prompts, and for image-to-video generation, we test SkyReels-I2V on 200 prompts paired with their corresponding reference images. As shown in Figure 3(b), human artists consistently prefer outputs refined with RLHF. More visualization results can be found in Figure 10 in Appendix, and Appendix 11.
items.zh: 我们展示了人工评估的结果，使用内部提示和参考图像进行。对于文本到图像生成，我们在240个提示上评估FLUX。对于文本到视频生成，我们在200个提示上评估HunyuanVideo，对于图像到视频生成，我们在200个提示及其对应参考图像上测试SkyReels-I2V。如图3(b)所示，人类艺术家一致偏好经过RLHF精炼的输出。更多可视化结果见附录图10和附录11。

items.en: Ablation on Timestep Selection. As detailed in Section 2.2, we investigate the impact of timestep selection on the training dynamics of the HunyuanVideo-T2I model. We conduct an ablation study across three experimental conditions: (1) training exclusively on the first 30% of timesteps from noise, (2) training on randomly sampled 30% of timesteps, (3) training on the final 40% of timesteps before outputs, (4) training on randomly sampled 60% of timesteps, and (5) training on sampled 100% of timesteps. As shown in Figure 4(b), empirical results indicate that the initial 30% of timesteps are critical for learning foundational generative patterns, as evidenced by their disproportionate contribution to model performance. However, restricting training solely to this interval leads to performance degradation compared to full-sequence training, likely due to insufficient exposure to late-stage refinement dynamics.
items.zh: 时间步选择的消融研究。如第2.2节所述，我们研究了时间步选择对HunyuanVideo-T2I模型训练动态的影响。我们在五个实验条件下进行了消融研究：(1) 仅在从噪声开始的前30%时间步上训练，(2) 在随机采样的30%时间步上训练，(3) 在输出前的最后40%时间步上训练，(4) 在随机采样的60%时间步上训练，(5) 在采样的100%时间步上训练。如图4(b)所示，实证结果表明，初始30%的时间步对于学习基础生成模式至关重要，因为它们对模型性能的贡献不成比例。然而，仅在此区间训练会导致性能相比全序列训练下降，可能是由于对后期精炼动态的暴露不足。

items.en: To reconcile this trade-off between computational efficiency and model fidelity, we always implement a 40% stochastic timestep dropout strategy during training. This approach randomly masks 40% of timesteps across all phases while preserving temporal continuity in the latent diffusion process. The findings suggest that strategic timestep subsampling can optimize resource utilization in flow-based generative frameworks.
items.zh: 为了在计算效率和模型保真度之间取得平衡，我们始终在训练中实施40%的随机时间步丢弃策略。该方法随机掩盖所有阶段中40%的时间步，同时保持潜在扩散过程中的时间连续性。研究结果表明，策略性时间步子采样可以优化基于流的生成框架中的资源利用。

items.en: Ablation on Noise Level εt\varepsilon_{t}. We systematically investigate the impact of noise level εt\varepsilon_{t} during training on FLUX. Our analysis reveals that reducing εt\varepsilon_{t} leads to a significant performance degradation, as quantitatively demonstrated in Figure 4(c). Notably, experiments with alternative noise decay schedules (e.g., those used in DDPM) show no statistically significant differences in output quality compared to our baseline configuration. Futhermore, the noise level larger than 0.3 sometimes leads to noisy images after RLHF training.
items.zh: 噪声水平εt的消融研究。我们系统研究了训练期间噪声水平εt对FLUX的影响。我们的分析表明，降低εt会导致显著的性能下降，如图4(c)定量所示。值得注意的是，使用其他噪声衰减调度（例如DDPM中使用的）的实验在输出质量上与我们的基线配置相比没有统计学显著差异。此外，大于0.3的噪声水平有时会导致RLHF训练后出现噪声图像。

items.capEn: Figure 4: This figure shows the rewards on Best-of-N inference scaling, the ablation on timestep selection, and the ablation on noise level, respectively. While Best-of-N inference scaling consistently improves performance with more samples, it reduces sampling efficiency. Therefore, we leave Best-of-N as an optional extension.
items.capZh: 图4：该图分别展示了Best-of-N推理缩放的奖励、时间步选择的消融研究以及噪声水平的消融研究。虽然Best-of-N推理缩放随着样本增多持续提升性能，但它降低了采样效率。因此，我们将Best-of-N作为可选扩展。

items.en: Aligning Large Language Models. Large Language Models (LLMs) [42, 43, 44, 45, 46] are typically aligned with Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) [47, 46, 45, 48, 49, 50]. RLHF involves training a reward function based on comparison data of model outputs to capture human preferences, which is then utilized in reinforcement learning to align the policy model. While some approaches leverage policy gradient methods, others focus on Direct Policy Optimization (DPO) [51]. Policy gradient methods have proven effective but are computationally expensive and require extensive hyperparameter tuning. In contrast, DPO offers a more cost-efficient alternative but consistently underperforms compared to policy gradient methods.
items.zh: 对齐大型语言模型。大型语言模型（LLM）[42, 43, 44, 45, 46]通常通过基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）[47, 46, 45, 48, 49, 50]进行对齐。RLHF涉及基于模型输出的比较数据训练奖励函数以捕捉人类偏好，然后将其用于强化学习以对齐策略模型。虽然一些方法利用策略梯度方法，其他方法则关注直接策略优化（DPO）[51]。策略梯度方法已被证明有效，但计算成本高且需要大量超参数调优。相比之下，DPO提供了更具成本效益的替代方案，但始终不如策略梯度方法。

items.en: Recently, DeepSeek-R1 [20] demonstrated that the application of large-scale reinforcement learning with formatting and result-only reward functions can guide LLMs toward the self-emergence of thought processes, enabling human-like complex chain-of-thought reasoning. This approach has achieved significant advantages in complex reasoning tasks, showcasing immense potential in advancing reasoning capabilities within Large Language Models.
items.zh: 最近，DeepSeek-R1 [20]证明，应用大规模强化学习与格式化和仅结果奖励函数可以引导LLM自我涌现思维过程，实现类似人类的复杂思维链推理。该方法在复杂推理任务中取得了显著优势，展示了在大型语言模型中推进推理能力的巨大潜力。

items.en: Aligning Diffusion Models and Rectified Flows. Diffusion models and rectified flows can also benefit significantly from alignment with human feedback, but the exploration remains primitive compared with LLMs. Key approaches in this area include: (1) Direct Policy Optimization (DPO)-style [52, 14, 41, 53, 12] methods, (2) direct backpropagation with reward signals [54], such as ReFL [9], and (3) policy gradient-based methods, including DPOK [19] and DDPO [18]. However, production-level models predominantly rely on DPO and ReFL, as previous policy gradient methods have demonstrated instability when applied to large-scale settings. Our work addresses this limitation, providing a robust solution to enhance stability and scalability. We also hope our work offers insights into its potential to unify optimization paradigms across different modalities (e.g. image and text) [55, 56].
items.zh: 对齐扩散模型和整流流。扩散模型和整流流也可以从与人类反馈的对齐中显著受益，但与LLM相比，探索仍处于初级阶段。该领域的关键方法包括：(1) 直接策略优化（DPO）风格[52, 14, 41, 53, 12]方法，(2) 使用奖励信号直接反向传播[54]，如ReFL [9]，以及(3) 基于策略梯度的方法，包括DPOK [19]和DDPO [18]。然而，生产级模型主要依赖DPO和ReFL，因为先前的策略梯度方法在大规模设置中表现出不稳定性。我们的工作解决了这一限制，提供了增强稳定性和可扩展性的稳健解决方案。我们也希望我们的工作能为其在不同模态（如图像和文本）[55, 56]中统一优化范式的潜力提供见解。

items.en: This work pioneers the integration of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) into visual generation, establishing DanceGRPO as a unified framework for enhancing diffusion models and rectified flows across text-to-image, text-to-video, and image-to-video tasks. By bridging the gap between language and visual modalities, our approach addresses critical limitations of prior methods, achieving superior performance through efficient alignment with human preferences and robust scaling to complex, multi-task settings. Experiments demonstrate substantial improvements in visual fidelity, motion quality, and text-image alignment. Future work will explore GRPO’s extension to multimodal generation, further unifying optimization paradigms across Generative AI.
items.zh: 本工作开创性地将组相对策略优化（GRPO）集成到视觉生成中，建立了DanceGRPO作为统一框架，用于增强文本到图像、文本到视频和图像到视频任务中的扩散模型和整流流。通过弥合语言和视觉模态之间的差距，我们的方法解决了先前方法的关键局限性，通过高效对齐人类偏好和稳健扩展到复杂多任务设置实现了卓越性能。实验表明，在视觉保真度、运动质量和文本-图像对齐方面有显著改进。未来工作将探索GRPO在多模态生成中的扩展，进一步统一生成式AI中的优化范式。
